title: 3D Wooden Modeler — Template Library File (.woodtemplates.json)
description: Exported custom template library produced by exportTemplates(). An array of template objects; the same format is stored in localStorage under 'woodmodeler_templates'. Built-in templates follow the same shape but also carry a nameKey for i18n translation.

name.description: Display name of the template. Shown in the + Add mega-dropdown and used as the deduplication key on import (existing templates with the same name are skipped).

nameKey.description: Optional i18n translation key (e.g. 'template.builtIn.board2x4'). Present on built-in templates; absent on user-created ones. When present, the translated string overrides 'name' in the UI.

type.description: Piece shape. Must match one of the fixed English identifiers used in the app.

price.description: Default price applied when adding a piece from this template (fixed mode). Optional; defaults to 0.

w.description: Width in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket.

h.description: Height in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket, Dowel, Tapered Leg.

d.description: Depth in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket.

r.description: Radius in mm. Required for Dowel.

rTop.description: Top radius in mm. Required for Tapered Leg.

rBottom.description: Bottom radius in mm. Required for Tapered Leg.
